Video.summary: Sally Field details her relationship with Burt Reynolds. Plus, Buddy Hackett appears.
Video.title: Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Sally Field (2/20/79)

Image.alt: Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Sally Field (2/20/79)
Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Sally Field (2/20/79)

Video.summary: Even Buddy Hackett bombs sometimes--just not for Johnny Carson. Plus, Rocky Graziano stops by.
Video.title: Comic Legends Of The '60s - Buddy Hackett (12/8/81)

Video.summary: Rich Hall details his comedy climb: wrote for Letterman, “Not Necessarily the News,” and then joined SNL.

Video.summary: Dan Aykroyd is very passionate about psychic phenomena and is joined by his Ghostbusters co-star Bill Murray.
Video.title: The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Bill Murray, Dan Aykroyd (6/6/84)

Video.summary: Suzanne Pleshette recites a poem. Chess champion Bobby Fischer does a numbers puzzle in just a few seconds.
Video.title: The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Suzanne Pleshette, Dom Deluise, Bobby Fischer (11/8/72)

Image.alt: The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Suzanne Pleshette, Dom Deluise, Bobby Fischer (11/8/72)

Video.summary: The gorgeous and talented Ann-Margret says she disguises herself in a black wig when out in public.

Video.summary: Carl chats about wife Estelle, a nose injury, forgetfulness, and When Harry Met Sally, by his son Rob Reiner.

Video.summary: Johnny isn't interested in what Charles Grodin has to say. B.B. King and Amy Yasbeck also grace the couch.

Video.summary: Sammy Davis Jr. is a fan of soap operas and Burt Reynolds surprises him. Shelley Winters talks about her book.

Video.summary: Burt Reynolds recounts his painful kidney stone. Dom DeLuise keeps getting misstaken for Pavarotti.
